title: myosotis sylvatica subsp. elongata
intro: Myosotis sylvatica subsp. elongata, commonly known as Alpine Forget-me-not, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the borage family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds. The health benefits of Alpine Forget-me-not include its potential to soothe digestive issues, reduce anxiety and stress, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. Alpine Forget-me-not is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
